notes: Pinned ratchet floors that must not regress. The contract_test_count metric is the static declaration count produced by scripts/audit.mjs::countTests (matches /^\s*(it|test)\(/gm across git-tracked tests/**/*.test.* files), not the vitest runtime total; the audit uses the static count so the ratchet is deterministic without shelling into vitest. Advancement is an explicit commit action; HEAD~1 moving-window comparison is insufficient (docs-only commits between regression and audit would hide the regression). Close gates depend on this file, not on HEAD~1 alone. See specs/plans/phase-1-close-revised.md §Slice 26b and ADR-0002 Addendum A. Initial floor 574 pinned post-Slice-26b (post-Codex-fold-in) HEAD static count. Slice 33 (P2.2): +26 (plugin-surface), 574 → 727. Slice 34 (P2.3): +13 (spine-coverage), 727 → 740. Slice 35 (pre-P2.4 fold-in #1 methodology upgrade): +39 (artifact-backing-path-integrity), 740 → 779. Slice 37 (pre-P2.4 fold-in #3 HIGH 2 widen event schema): +31 (slice-37-dispatch-transcript), 779 → 810. Slice 38 (pre-P2.4 fold-in #4 HIGH 1 dispatch wiring + ADR-0008): +18 (adapter-binding-coverage), 810 → 828. Slice 39 (pre-P2.4 fold-in #5 HIGH 4 artifact-path split): +2 (empty-allowlist + terminal-green guards), 828 → 830. Slice 40 (pre-P2.4 arc-close ceremony): +5 net (two-prong Check 26 tightening +6 / −3 superseded, +2 synthetic-shape tests per convergent MED 1 / LOW 2), 830 → 835. Slice 41 (ADR-0009 adapter invocation pattern + Check 28 `checkAdapterInvocationDiscipline` binding): +9 (adapter-invocation-discipline — 6 initial + 3 Codex fold-in), 835 → 844. Slice 42 (P2.4 real agent adapter — `src/runtime/adapters/agent.ts` + `src/runtime/adapters/dispatch-materializer.ts` + Check 29 `checkAdapterImportDiscipline` import-level scan per ADR-0009 §4 Slice 42 binding + Codex Slice 42 HIGH 1-5 + MED 1-4 + LOW 1-2 fold-ins): +41 total (+37 in tests/contracts/slice-42-agent-adapter.test.ts covering adapter module shape + stream-json NDJSON parseAgentStdout + capability-boundary fail-closed runtime assertion on init.tools/mcp_servers/slash_commands + cli_version binding + terminal-result LAST-event semantics + subtype==='init' filter + empty-stdout / malformed-NDJSON / is_error error paths + Check 29 positive+negative cases for all import patterns (exact-match, sub-path, dynamic import(), CJS require(), re-export, side-effect, .d.ts skipping) + Codex MED 1 comment-stripping false-positive + inline createRequire bypass + capability-boundary flag binding + FORBIDDEN_ADAPTER_SDK_DEPS set cardinality; +2 static declarations in tests/runner/agent-adapter-smoke.test.ts covering dispatchAgent export shape + sha256Hex digest canonicality; +2 static declarations in tests/runner/agent-dispatch-roundtrip.test.ts covering materializeDispatch export + dispatch-kinds discriminator shape; the AGENT_SMOKE-gated end-to-end subprocess invocations in both runner tests use the conditional `(AGENT_SMOKE ? it : it.skip)` form which does not match the /^\s*(it|test)\(/gm static pattern and is therefore not counted by the ratchet), 844 → 885. Metadata fields (schema_version, last_advanced_at, last_advanced_in_slice) are audit-enforced via validatePinnedRatchetFloorData; floor zero or negative is rejected (Codex HIGH-2 fold-in). Future slices raise the floor only as an explicit ratchet-advance act.
